summary.phase_0: Platform Abstraction — 3 agents parallel, 9 files created, 5 modified, 116 tests pass
summary.phase_1: MCP Models + Storage — 4 agents parallel, models + store + Keychain + migration
summary.phase_2: Core Adapters — 4 agents parallel, 4 adapters (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code) + JSONMerger + MCPSyncAdapter
summary.phase_3: Sync Engine + UI — 3 agents parallel, MCPSyncEngine actor + AuditLogger + 3 SwiftUI views
summary.phase_4: Remaining Adapters + Registry + Watcher — 5 agents parallel, 5 adapters (Windsurf, Zed, Antigravity, Codex, JetBrains) + TOMLSerializer + XMLSerializer + Smithery + FileWatcher
summary.phase_5: Multi-Device Sync — 3 agents parallel, iCloud KVS + CloudKit + ConflictResolver + Settings UI
summary.phase_6: Docs + Security Audit + Release — docs/MCP_SYNC.md, docs/MULTI_DEVICE_SYNC.md, CHANGELOG, AGENTS.md, security audit report

key_architecture_decisions: Swift (not Rust) — existing codebase is Swift
TOMLSerializer tự viết ≤200 LOC — no dependency
XMLSerializer dùng XMLParser Foundation — no dependency
Secrets NOT synced via iCloud — metadata only
Platform abstraction Phase 0 — pure refactor, zero behavior change
